memory.title: Model Council discussion
memory.user_goal: The human host wants multiple model perspectives with objections, criticisms, and short decisions.

agent_positions.product: Product Agent tracks framing, UX, and trust.
agent_positions.builder: Builder Agent tracks implementation, tools, APIs, and data flow.
agent_positions.strategist: Strategy Agent tracks structure, decisions, and business logic.
agent_positions.critic: Critic Agent tracks risks, objections, legality, fairness, and weak assumptions.
